character.bio: A cheerful girl raised in the arms of the savannah, and a member of a clan of proud warriors. She has a talent for healing, and seeks to become a veterinarian.

elena_standing_medium_punch_m.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position on Punish Counter

elena_standing_medium_kick_m.note: 2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

elena_standing_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing positionForces a juggle state on Punish Counter

elena_standing_heavy_kick_h.note: Feet are invincible between frames 9 - 17Forces a juggle state on Punish Counter, or when it hits as a mid-air Counter or Punish CounterJuggle state time is extended when attack hits a mid-air opponent as a Punish Counter

elena_crouching_medium_kick_m.note: 2 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_crouching_heavy_punch_h.note: Forces the opponent into a standing position

elena_crouching_heavy_kick_h.note: Knockdown time extended when the attack lands as a Punish Counter, and changes to Hard Knockdown

elena_jumping_medium_punch.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

elena_jumping_heavy_kick.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent with the 1st attackForces a slam knockdown when hitting a mid-air opponent with the 2nd attack*Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

elena_slide_h.note: 4 frames of recovery added on armor hit or if the attack misses

elena_round_arch_h.note: Feet are invincible between frames 9 - 17Forces a juggle state when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter2 frames of recovery added when the attack misses

elena_fluttering_lark_2.note: 4 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_raptor_range.note: Forces a juggle state when hitting a mid-air opponent

elena_l_rhino_horn_l.note: Considered airborne from frames 13 - 363 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_m_rhino_horn_m.note: Considered airborne from frames 17 - 414 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_h_rhino_horn_h.note: Considered airborne from frames 21 - 454 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_od_rhino_horn.note: Considered airborne from frames 11 - 386 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_l_scratch_wheel_l.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 7Considered airborne from frames 7 - 37

elena_m_scratch_wheel_m.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 10Considered airborne from frames 7 - 42

elena_h_scratch_wheel_h.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 11Considered airborne from frames 7 - 46

elena_od_scratch_wheel.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 8Considered airborne from frames 7 - 52

elena_l_lynx_song_l.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 11 - 21Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 13 - 21Can transition to Lynx Whirl, Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 16 - 21

elena_m_lynx_song_m.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 11 - 22Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 13 - 22Can transition to Lynx Whirl, Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 22

elena_h_lynx_song_h.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 11 - 24Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 16 - 24Can transition to Lynx Whirl, Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 19 - 24

elena_od_lynx_song.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 8 - 26Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 15 - 24Can transition to Lynx Whirl, Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 24

elena_boosted_leopard_snap.level: (During OD Lynx Song Lynx Whirl)  L
elena_boosted_leopard_snap.note: 1 frame of recovery added when the attack misses

elena_boosted_harvest_circle.level: (During OD Lynx Song Lynx Whirl)  M
elena_boosted_harvest_circle.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 1 - 102 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_boosted_mallet_smash.level: (During OD Lynx Song Lynx Whirl)  H
elena_boosted_mallet_smash.note: Considered airborne from frames 9 - 22*Second attack becomes an overhead only if the first attack whiffs

elena_l_lynx_whirl.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 1 - 21Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 15 - 21Can transition to Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 21Can transition to Lynx Whirl from frames 20 - 21

elena_m_lynx_whirl.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 1 - 26Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 15 - 21Can transition to Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 21Can transition to Lynx Whirl from frames 20 - 21

elena_h_lynx_whirl.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 1 - 26Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 15 - 21Can transition to Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 21Can transition to Lynx Whirl from frames 20 - 21

elena_od_lynx_whirl.note: Projectile invincibility from frames 1 - 26Can transition to Leopard Snap from frames 15 - 24Can transition to Harvest Circle and Mallet Smash from frames 18 - 24Can transition to Lynx Whirl from frames 20 - 24

elena_l_spinning_scythe_l.note: Can transition to Lynx Whirl on hit from frames 38 - 40Can transition to Lynx Whirl on block on frame 40

elena_m_spinning_scythe_m.note: Can transition to Lynx Whirl on hit from frames 48 - 50Can transition to Lynx Whirl on block on frame 50

elena_h_spinning_scythe_h.note: Can transition to Lynx Whirl on hit from frames 50 - 52Can transition to Lynx Whirl on block on frame 52

elena_od_spinning_scythe.note: Can transition to Lynx Whirl on hit from frames 37 - 39Can transition to Lynx Whirl on block on frame 39

elena_l_moon_glider_1_l.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 21 - 23Forces the opponent into a standing position

elena_m_moon_glider_1_m.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 25 - 27Forces the opponent into a standing position

elena_h_moon_glider_1_h.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 29 - 31Forces the opponent into a standing position

elena_od_moon_glider_1.note: Can transition to branching attacks from frames 24 - 26Forces the opponent into a standing position

elena_sa1_meteor_volley.note: Invincible against mid-air projectiles and strikes with mid-air hitboxes from frames 1 - 23Considered airborne from frames 9 - 65Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterThe minimum guaranteed damage is 30%8 frames of recovery subtracted on hit

elena_sa2_revival_dance.note: Completely invincible on frames 1 - 17Minimum guaranteed damage is set to 40%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish CounterProperties change to the following when a down input is held during the attack:- Damage changes to 1950- 1600 vitality recovered・Recovers the Drive Gauge by 10,000

elena_sa3_song_of_the_grasslands.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
elena_sa3_song_of_the_grasslands.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
elena_sa3_song_of_the_grasslands.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 11The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

elena_ca_song_of_the_grasslands.context: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below)
elena_ca_song_of_the_grasslands.input: (More powerful when vitality is at 25% or below) ↓↙←↓↙← + K
elena_ca_song_of_the_grasslands.note: Completely invincible between frames 1 - 11The minimum guaranteed damage is 50%Values do not change when the attack lands as a counter or Punish Counter* Can only be canceled into from special moves

elena_leg_tackle.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

elena_leg_lift_throw.note: Properties change to the following when the attack lands as a Punish Counter:- Deals 2040 damage- Super Art gauge increases by 4000- Forces a hard knockdown

elena_drive_impact_giraffe_neck.note: Super Armor for 2 attacks between frames 1 - 27Produces a wall splat if the pushback on hit causes the opponent to connect with the stage wallOn Punish Counter or after a successful hit after Super Armor absorbs a hit, the following properties change:- Produces a crumple stun if the opponent is standing on the ground- Juggle state time is increased if the opponent is in the air- Super Art gauge increases by 3000

elena_drive_reversal_block.level: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)  HH
elena_drive_reversal_block.context: (When blocking or during a successful Drive Parry)
elena_drive_reversal_block.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 225 frames of recovery added on hit

elena_drive_reversal_wakeup.note: Recoverable damageCompletely invincible between frames 1 - 205 frames of recovery added on hit

elena_drive_parry.context: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration)
elena_drive_parry.input: (Hold the button to extend the move's duration) MP + MK
elena_drive_parry.note: *1 Can be canceled from the 4th frame via Drive Rush*2 Parry hitbox is extended for as long as the buttons are heldOnly blocks can be performed during the recovery periodAlways in Punish Counter state during execution

elena_perfect_parry_strike.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frame. (For high and overhead attacks, the player must press the direction away from the opponent. For low attacks, down and back)If no direction is inputted the result will be a regular parry with an additional Drive increase of 3000.Fully invincible for 5 frames once recovery is over (invincibility not granted if you continue the parry)The player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

elena_perfect_parry_projectile.note: Perfect Parry activates when an attack is absorbed on the frame a parry is input, or on the next frameNo screen freeze occursThe player on the receiving end of a Perfect Parry cannot cancel and is forced into a Punish Counter state until their move is finished

elena_parry_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 10th frame* Can be canceled into an attack on the 9th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 24th frame

elena_cancel_drive_rush.input: (While connecting with a special-cancelable move) →→ + /5/6MP + MK
elena_cancel_drive_rush.note: Screen freeze occurs until the 9th frame* Can be canceled into an attack from the 10th frame of the move   Can be canceled into actions other than a parry from the 25th frame
